subcodes.first_line: We make mention, at the close of this Book, of the loved ones of God whose names were not brought before Our Presence, that they may be assured through Divine grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و نذکر فی آخر الکتاب احباء الله الذین ماذکرت اسمائهم لدی الوجه لیطمئنوا بفضل
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement
